hints.piano: soft weighted motion, keys-timed gentle camera breath
hints.strings: sustained emotional swell, slow arc camera movement
hints.violin: precise tight motion, bowing-synced light arcs
hints.guitar: rhythmic body accent, pick-strike synced light flash
hints.drums: beat-driven cuts, impact-synced rim flash, percussive camera snap
hints.percussion: sharp staccato cuts, impact light burst on beat
hints.bass: deep grounded movement, low-angle weight, subsonic visual pulse
hints.synth: ambient layered depth parallax, wave-like neon light drift
hints.choir: wide expansive frame, multiple depth layers, breath-held stillness
hints.trumpet: bold directional light burst, sharp staccato camera cut
hints.sax: melodic brass-reed sway, warm spotlight arcs following the phrase
hints.saxophone: melodic brass-reed sway, warm spotlight arcs following the phrase
hints.accordion: breathing bellows motion, nostalgic side-to-side stage sway
hints.organ: sustained retro chord glow, slow rotating room-light movement
hints.taepyeongso: piercing traditional reed accent, sharp ceremonial light flare
hints.piri: thin reed melody drift, delicate traditional phrase-following motion
hints.flute: airy drifting movement, soft high-key light touches
hints.harp: delicate floating motion, soft shimmer light cascade
